title: anchusa azurea var. macrocarpa
intro: Anchusa azurea var. macrocarpa, also known as tall spikes speedwell, is a perennial plant species within the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Anchusa azurea var. macrocarpa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
